user.title: Weekly Thermostat
user.description: This creates the Weekly Thermostat. After setup, use the integration's "Configure" button to add daily profiles, zones and rooms.

abort.already_configured: Weekly Thermostat is already set up.

profiles.title: Daily profiles
profiles.description: Pick a profile to edit, or add a new one.

profile_edit.title: Edit profile
profile_edit.description: One slot per line as "HH:MM temperature" (e.g. "06:30 21"). The first slot must start at 00:00.

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Pick a zone to edit, or add a new one.

zone_edit.title: Edit zone
zone_edit.description: Assign a daily profile to each weekday. Overrides replace the schedule for a date range: one "YYYY-MM-DD YYYY-MM-DD profile" per line.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Pick the zone whose rooms you want to manage.

room_select.title: Rooms
room_select.description: Pick a room to edit, or add a new one.

error.invalid_slots: Invalid slots. Use "HH:MM temperature" on each line; the first slot must start at 00:00.
error.invalid_overrides: Invalid overrides. Use "YYYY-MM-DD YYYY-MM-DD profile" on each line, referencing an existing profile.
error.no_profiles: Create at least one daily profile before adding a zone.
error.no_zones: Create at least one zone before adding rooms.
